message:
feat(spec): Integrate 12 protocol review patches into FCP V2

Major security and operability improvements:

1. 2-axis zone lattice (Integrity + Confidentiality)
   - DeclassificationToken for confidentiality downgrades
   - ACL generation checks both axes

2. Zone key rotation with ZoneKeyManifest
   - Per-node sealed key distribution (X25519)
   - ZoneKeyRing for deterministic decryption
   - No owner secret key required at nodes

3. ObjectId improvements
   - BLAKE3 keyed hash for performance + privacy
   - SchemaHash for DoS-resistant type binding
   - ObjectIdKey per zone

4. Per-frame signatures (not per-symbol)
   - SignedFcpsFrame for attribution/rate limiting
   - Major throughput improvement

5. Symbol flow control
   - DecodeStatus and SymbolAck feedback
   - Prevents self-DoS, stabilizes multipath

6. Revocation freshness semantics
   - RevocationEvent chain + RevocationHead
   - Tokens bound to rev_head for freshness

7. Token hardening
   - Separate node_iss_pubkey for token minting
   - holder_node + holder_proof for sender-constraining

8. Provenance/taint fixes
   - TaintFlags bitflags (compositional)
   - current_zone tracking, Provenance::merge()
   - Declassification enforcement in invoke()

9. Network TLS identity constraints
   - NetworkConstraints with SNI/SPKI pins
   - Prevents DNS pivot and host confusion

10. Connector runtime formats
    - WASI module support
    - StrictPlus microVM profile

11. Supply chain hardening
    - Threshold publisher signatures (2-of-3)
    - ConnectorTransparencyLogEntry

12. Execution leases
    - Prevents duplicate execution during migration
    - Mesh-native coordination without central coordinator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
